prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约16219名、14543名、13603名、26329名、14378名。2024年因专业组结构调整（新增"再选不限"组）出现异常大幅后移，但2025年迅速回归至14378名，近3年整体在13600–14500区间波动，2025年基准约14378名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划分别为99人、98人、96人、96人、97人，总体稳定在96–99人区间。2026年招生计划数据暂缺，按持平处理。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于全国顶尖211院校；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因为曾发生实验室爆炸火灾事故，引发对校园安全的关注；抖音热度评价为"较热"，总排名第45位，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，整体报考关注度平稳；系统科学A+（全国顶尖）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个学科获评A-及以上，在211高校中学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，与该校优势学科高度契合；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧；省控线方面，2025年广东物理类本科批436分、特殊类型招生控制线534分，近年波动不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在13600–14500区间波动、招生计划基本持平、2026年广东物理类考生增加约3.6%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面但学科实力强劲等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准14378名略有前移（竞争加剧，位次数字减小）。预测最低位次约14178名，区间13678–14678名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 16219, 14543, 13603, 26329, and 14378 respectively. In 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure (adding a "no re-selection restrictions" group), there was an abnormal significant drop, but in 2025 it quickly returned to 14378. Over the past 3 years, it has fluctuated within the 13600–14500 range, with a baseline of approximately 14378 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for the Physics Category were 99, 98, 96, 96, and 97 respectively, generally stable within the 96–99 range. Data for the 2026 enrollment plan is temporarily unavailable, and it is assumed to remain unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 41st, with recent rankings stable in the 40–43 range, making it a top-tier 211 institution. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a previous laboratory explosion and fire accident, raising concerns about campus safety. On Douyin, its popularity is rated as "relatively hot," ranking 45th overall, with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, and overall application attention is stable. It has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Systems Science A+ (top in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, highlighting its strong academic strength among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have a social popularity rating of "highly recommended" or "recommended," closely aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, in 2025, Guangdong's Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 436 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 534 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation within the 13600–14500 range, basically stable enrollment plans, a 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category examinees in 2026 leading to intensified competition, a slightly negative school reputation but strong academic strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline of 14378 (due to intensified competition, the ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14178, with a range of 13678–14678.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13678–14678, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Automation, and Transportation as the main choices. Tier 1 majors like the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and Computer Science can be used as reach options, while Tier 3 majors like Science Experimental Class and Software Engineering serve as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13678), you can focus on aiming for top-tier Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category were approximately 2467, 3066, 3680, 3872, and 3505 respectively. Overall, there is a backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), with a gradual backward shift of about 400–600 places each year from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, it rebounded to 3505, moving forward by about 367 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plans for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 6, 12, 11, 11, and 10 students respectively, stabilizing in the 10–12 range in recent years. The 2026 enrollment plan data is temporarily unavailable and is treated as unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 41st, placing it among the top-tier 211 universities nationwide. Although it is known for its strengths in science and engineering, its overall academic level still strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to a laboratory safety incident), but this mainly involves science and engineering labs, with limited impact on the psychology of liberal arts applicants. Its Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot,' with overall attention remaining stable. Among the university's liberal arts-related disciplines, Management Science and Engineering (A-) is related to the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting). Systems Science (A+) is the university's top discipline, indirectly positively influencing the psychology of liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity rating of 'recommended,' Journalism and Communication Studies is 'clearly discouraged,' and the Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting) corresponds to Management Science and Engineering (A-), with social popularity showing divergence and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, in 2025, Guangdong's History Category undergraduate batch line was 464 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 557 points, showing an upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations in the 2467–3872 range, the rebound to 3505 in 2025, the basically unchanged enrollment plan, and the significant increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees in 2026 leading to notably intensified competition, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (competition intensifies, ranking number decreases) compared to the 2025 baseline of 3505. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3355, with a range of 2855–3855.
